subject.description: Short imperative summary of the task (e.g. "Run tests", "Fix auth bug").

description.description: Full description of what the task entails. Include enough detail to be actionable later.

activeForm.description: Present-continuous form shown while the task is in progress (e.g. "Running tests", "Fixing auth bug").

metadata.description: Free-form string-valued metadata bag attached to the task.
